title: Herbal Puff Bake
description: A sweet and flaky pastry filled with gooey herbal goodness.
instructions: Roll out puff pastry to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Spread the gooey herbal filling over the center of the pastry, leaving a 1-inch border.
Drizzle with herbal syrup, if using.
Fold the pastry over the filling, pressing edges to seal.
Brush the egg wash over the pastry to glaze.
Cut a few slits in the top of the pastry to allow steam to escape.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown.
Let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
